title.en: Week 24 2026 Refrigeration & Heat Pump Industry Briefing
title.zh: 2026年第24周制冷与热泵行业简报

subtitle.en: IRN 2026 closes with ammonia vs CO₂ TCO debate (10–11 Jun); MEE 2027 ODS/HFC quota draft zero growth (10 Jun); IEA: heat pumps competitive in 16 EU countries (12 Jun); GoodWe PV-driven heat pumps at SNEC (11 Jun); Differ Power 9-in-1 R290 hub preview (12 Jun)
subtitle.zh: IRN 2026 闭幕聚焦氨 vs CO₂ 全生命周期（6/10–11）；生态环境部 6/10 发布 2027 配额征求意见稿总量零增长；IEA 6/12：16 国住宅热泵持有成本优于燃气锅炉；GoodWe 6/11 SNEC 发布光伏直驱热泵；Differ Power 6/12 预览 9 合 1 R290 能源枢纽

en: IRN 2026 (10–11 Jun): IIAR keynotes; Star Refrigeration ammonia vs CO₂ lifecycle cost session
MEE draft 2027 ODS/HFC quota plan (10 Jun): zero growth; HFC-245fa cross-category cap raised to 50%
IEA analysis (12 Jun): residential heat pumps cost-competitive vs gas boilers in 16 EU countries
GoodWe GoodHeat (11 Jun): DC-coupled air-to-water heat pumps 6–34.15 kW at SNEC Shanghai
Differ Power D1 Series preview (12 Jun): 9-in-1 R290 solar-storage heat pump ahead of Intersolar Europe
zh: IRN 2026（6/10–11）：IIAR 主旨演讲；Star Refrigeration 氨 vs CO₂ 全生命周期成本专题
生态环境部 6/10 发布 2027 年度 ODS/HFC 配额征求意见稿：总量零增长；HFC-245fa 跨品类调增上限提至 50%
IEA 6/12 分析：16 个欧盟国家住宅热泵全生命周期持有成本优于燃气锅炉
GoodWe GoodHeat 6/11 于 SNEC 上海发布 6–34.15 kW 光伏直驱空气源热泵
Differ Power 6/12 预览 D1 系列 9 合 1 R290 光储热泵，面向 Intersolar Europe 展前发布

title.en: Week 23 2026 Refrigeration & Heat Pump Industry Briefing
title.zh: 2026年第23周制冷与热泵行业简报

subtitle.en: China FAS 2026/550 label rules enter first enforcement week (1 Jun); US DOE ends HEEHR/HOMES fuel-switching rebates (29 May); Danfoss €10M Reyrieux expansion at Choose France (1 Jun); HFC quota tight balance (4 Jun); AHRI CEO Yurek to retire 2027 (4 Jun)
subtitle.zh: 国内 550 号文能效标识 6/1 首周施行；美国 DOE 5/29 叫停联邦返利燃气改电；Danfoss 6/1 于 Choose France 再投 1000 万欧元扩 Reyrieux 热泵部件产能；三代制冷剂配额紧平衡（6/4 机构观点）；AHRI 总裁 Yurek 6/4 宣布 2027 年退休

en: FAS 2026/550: refrigerator & road/tunnel LED label rules effective 1 Jun 2026—first compliance week
US DOE Program Notice 26-2 (29 May): ~$8.8B HOMES/HEEHR rebates no longer cover gas-to-electric fuel switching
Danfoss €10M Reyrieux investment (1 Jun): heat-pump compressors, ATEX lab, on-site solar
Securities research (4 Jun): 2026 HFC quotas unchanged; R32/R134a/R125 tight balance persists
AHRI president & CEO Stephen Yurek to retire in 2027; board search under way (4 Jun)
zh: 发改环资规〔2026〕550 号：家用冰箱与道路隧道 LED 能效标识 6/1 起施行，首周合规窗口开启
美国 DOE 5/29 发布 Program Notice 26-2：约 88 亿美元 HOMES/HEEHR 返利不再支持燃气改电
Danfoss 6/1 于 Choose France 峰会宣布向法国 Reyrieux 热泵部件基地追加 1000 万欧元
证券时报等 6/4：2026 年 HFC 配额总量与 2025 持平，R32/R134a/R125 紧平衡景气延续
AHRI 6/4：总裁兼 CEO Stephen Yurek 将于 2027 年退休，董事会已启动继任搜寻

title.en: Week 22 2026 Refrigeration & Heat Pump Industry Briefing
title.zh: 2026年第22周制冷与热泵行业简报

subtitle.en: 15th IEA HPC Vienna closes with 800+ delegates; EHPA re-elects Crombez & Rittinger Award; China FAS 2026/550 in force 1 Jun; US EPA relaxes AIM Act HFC transitions (26 May); Singapore NEA GWP≤150 from Jul 2027
subtitle.zh: 第15届 IEA 热泵大会维也纳闭幕（800+ 代表）；EHPA 连任 Crombez 并颁发 Rittinger 奖；国内 550 号文冰箱与道路 LED 标识 6/1 施行；美国 EPA 5/26 放宽 AIM 技术转换限值；新加坡 NEA 2027 年起商超 GWP≤150

en: 15th IEA HPC Vienna 26–29 May: 800+ attendees, 367 scientific contributions
EHPA GA 27 May: Patrick Crombez re-elected president; five Rittinger Award recipients
FAS 2026/550: household refrigerator & road/tunnel LED label rules effective 1 Jun 2026
US EPA AIM Act TTR revision (26 May): relaxed supermarket/IPR GWP limits; legacy AC/HP install allowed
Singapore NEA (28 May): supermarket GWP ≤150 from Jul 2027; end-of-life refrigerant handling rules
zh: 第15届 IEA 热泵大会 5/26–29 维也纳：800+ 代表、367 篇科学投稿
EHPA 5/27 大会：Patrick Crombez 连任主席；五人获 Peter Ritter von Rittinger 奖
发改环资规〔2026〕550 号：家用冰箱与道路隧道 LED 能效标识 6/1 起施行
美国 EPA 5/26 修订 AIM 技术转换规则：商超/IPR 限值放宽、住宅热泵遗留库存可继续安装
新加坡 NEA 5/28：2027/7 起商超制冷 GWP≤150；报废制冷设备制冷剂处置须登记

title.en: Week 21 2026 Refrigeration & Heat Pump Industry Briefing
title.zh: 2026年第21周制冷与热泵行业简报

subtitle.en: EU IF25 Heat Auction ~€400M awards; EHPA Q1 2026 Europe heat-pump rebound; China energy-label catalog 2026 from 1 Jun; Vienna IEA HPC opens 26 May; site standards quick reference updated 22 May
subtitle.zh: 欧盟 IF25 工业用热拍卖公布约 4 亿欧元中标、EHPA 通报欧洲 Q1 热泵销量回暖；国内能效标识 2026 版目录 6 月起实施；维也纳 IEA 热泵大会即将开幕；本站工业热泵标准速查 5/22 更新

en: EU IF25 Heat Auction: 22 May — 65 projects, ~€396M, 10 Member States
Commission confirms second industrial heat auction later in 2026 (19 May)
EHPA: ~575k residential units in 11 EU countries in Q1 2026, ~+17% YoY
NDRC/FAS 2026/550: revised energy-label catalog; key rules from 1 Jun 2026
15th IEA Heat Pump Conference, Vienna, 26–29 May (~380 submissions)
zh: 欧盟 IF25 工业用热拍卖：5/22 公布 65 个项目、约 3.96 亿欧元、10 国中标
欧委会 5/19 确认年内将举办第二轮工业用热拍卖
EHPA：欧洲 11 国 2026 Q1 热泵销量约 57.5 万台、同比约 +17%
发改环资规〔2026〕550 号：能效标识目录（2026 版）多项 6/1 起施行
第 15 届 IEA 热泵大会 5/26–29 维也纳开幕（约 380 篇投稿）

title.en: Beyond the Hype: The Real Moat is Extreme Testing (-40°C to +300°C)
title.zh: 超越炒作：真正的护城河是极端测试 (-40°C 至 +300°C)

excerptPlain.en: Claim: Everyone claims 160°C capability, but few can prove it. Reality: The future belongs to those who build CNAS-level infrastructure to verify R744/Steam systems under extreme load boundaries. Prin
excerptPlain.zh: 行业宣称： 行业都在宣称 160°C 能力，但鲜有能证明者。 现实情况： 未来属于那些构建 CNAS 级基础设施以验证 R744/蒸汽系统在极端负载边界下的性能的团队。 核心原则： 验证 > 规格。

title.en: Large Screw Compressor Seizure: Not "Oil Starvation", but "Deadly Stacking of Tolerance & Thermal Deformation"
title.zh: 大型螺杆机抱死真相：不是"缺油"，是"公差与热变形的死亡叠加"

excerptPlain.en: Misconception: Normal oil level (60%+) ≠ effective lubrication. Simply replacing bearings cannot solve "critical friction". Truth: Deep disassembly revealed that a certain series of heavy-duty models
excerptPlain.zh: 误区： 油位正常 (60%+) ≠ 有效润滑。单纯换轴承无法解决"临界摩擦"。 真相： 深度拆解发现， 某系列重载机型 在最大公差组合下，阳转子咬合阴转子约 35μm 。叠加吸气端供油不对称与热变形，导致密封线在无油膜状态下崩塌。 结论： 真正的修复必须从"制造侧重构公差链"与"运行侧增加临界保护"双向入手。

title.en: 5 Site Visits to Solve a "Mystery" Seizure: The -45°C Liquid Trap
title.zh: 5次现场排查：终结 -45°C 液击"悬案"

excerptPlain.en: Initial Diagnosis: Multiple large compressors seized and were initially blamed on manufacturing defects. Root Cause: After 5 site inspections, I traced the root cause not to the machine, but to the sy
excerptPlain.zh: 初步诊断： 多台大型压缩机抱死，最初被归咎于制造缺陷。 根因分析： 经过 5 次现场检查，根因并非机器本身，而是系统：由有缺陷的 -45°C 蒸发器设计导致的偶发性液击。 解决方案： 修复系统后，压缩机得以保全。
